name: First and Ten
author: Poki
description: First and Ten is a retro 8-bit football game where you call the shots as quarterback. Drag to aim and fire bullet passes downfield in fast-paced arcade action. Pick your team, play through full seasons, and upgrade your roster as you climb the rankings. Save your progress and keep pushing toward greatness. Can you become the GOAT? How do I play First and Ten? Use the mouse to play the game! Who created First and Ten? First and Ten was created by Glowmonkey. Play their other sports games on Poki: linebacker-alley, linebacker-alley-2, 4th-and-goal-2013, 4th-and-goal-2014, 4th and Goal 2018 , 4th and Goal 2019 , 4th and Goal 2020 , and 4th-and-goal-2021, 4th and Goal 2022 , 4th and Goal 2024 , and 4th and Goal 2026 ! How can I play First and Ten for free? You can play First and Ten for free on Poki. Can I play First and Ten on mobile devices and desktop? First and Ten can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
